description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow set within a walled rectangular plot featuring a spacious green lawn. The main building has two stories, a dark gabled roof, and a mix of white and beige exterior walls with stone and wood accents. The front facade includes a covered porch with columns, a prominent entry gate, and a paved driveway leading to a detached garage with a sloped roof. Several windows of varying sizes are distributed asymmetrically across the structure, and a pergola-covered patio is visible at the rear. The property is bordered by a stone and concrete fence, and there are a few trees and shrubs near the garage area. The overall design blends contemporary and traditional elements, providing both privacy and curb appeal.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a gabled roof, stone and wood accents, a detached garage, and a large fenced lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, entry gate, and detached garage with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the side elevation of the house with multiple windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pergola-covered patio, expansive lawn, and the back facade with more windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the side of the house, the lawn, and the rear section of the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and scattered windows on all facades
